Query.Sql: select distinct Record ->> '$.Urological.UrologicalCore.UrologicalCoreLinkagePatientId.NHSNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber, Record ->> '$.Urological.UrologicalCore.UrologicalCoreLinkageDiagnosticDetails.ClinicalDateCancerDiagnosis' as DateOfPrimaryDiagnosisClinicallyAgreed, Record ->> '$.Urological.UrologicalCore.UrologicalCoreDemographics.PersonStatedSexualOrientationCodeAtDiagnosis.@code' as PersonStatedSexualOrientationCodeAtDiagnosis from omop_staging.cosd_staging_81 where type = 'UR' and NhsNumber is not null and PersonStatedSexualOrientationCodeAtDiagnosis is not null and DateOfPrimaryDiagnosisClinicallyAgreed is not null;

Explanation.Description: The date the Primary Cancer was confirmed or the Primary Cancer diagnosis was clinically agreed.
Explanation.Origin: DATE OF PRIMARY CANCER DIAGNOSIS (CLINICALLY AGREED)

Explanation.Description: The sexual orientation as self-stated by the person at the point of cancer diagnosis.
Explanation.Origin: PERSON STATED SEXUAL ORIENTATION CODE (AT DIAGNOSIS)
